description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Applications Framework product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Search Bean [Incl.  Advanced]).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Applications Framework.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle Applications Framework accessible data as well as  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of Oracle Applications Framework accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.1 (Confidentiality and Integrity impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N).
